task: Prove a PowerShell module set (e.g. Microsoft365DSC-style resources) covers every parameter/type/Mandatory/AllowedValue in a target schema inventory
description: Six gates per resource: primitive exists (New-<Prefix><Resource>), every schema parameter present, Mandatory matches, DataType maps to a compatible PS type, ValidateSet covers every AllowedValue, and a Get-<Prefix><Resource> read-side accessor exists. Discovers covering functions via the `# COVERS-DSC-RESOURCE: <ResourceName>` marker comment.

task: Prove a Pax8-to-BC AL mirror table set carries every field the corresponding Pax8 OpenAPI schema declares
description: AL sibling of Invoke-KriticalLensSchemaCompleteness. Four gates per mirror (mirror table exists / every upstream scalar field present / flattened nested-ref sub-fields present / every upstream child array has its own mirror table), reading the Pax8 partner OpenAPI spec live (no hard-coded field list) so a newly-added upstream property surfaces as newly-missing.
